title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4/15/18: Free Audio History Books pages

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on April 15, 2018 about his ongoing project to update his website's free audiobook pages covering history, philosophy, and religion. He explains he finished recording page content but realized he forgot to add links to the actual free audio files on Librivox and Kindle, and that some books he listed as free now cost money. He estimates the full update — re-linking, re-recording, and rebuilding the pages — will take a couple more weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: worth finishing and maintaining; frustrated it has taken so long but committed to completing it
old slow computers made website work much harder; modern computers are magical by comparison

stances.topic: millennial perception of his unfinished website
stances.position: they don't understand the context of building on slow 90s/2000s hardware
only includes free ones; books that changed from free to paid are a minor annoyance he has to document
